Class BuildingCard

java.lang.Object
it.polimi.ingsw.am25.server.model.Card.Card
it.polimi.ingsw.am25.server.model.Card.BuildingCard
public class BuildingCard extends Card
Represents a building card in Mesos. Buildings are purchased with food during the resolve-action phase and may trigger special effects during the game or award prestige points at the end.

  • Field Summary

    Fields inherited from class Card

    cardType, era

    Method
    Description
    void
    addCardToPlayer(Player player)
    Adds this building to the player's owned buildings.

    Fires the bound building effect on the given player.

    Returns the event type that triggers this building's effect.

    Returns the unique identifier of this building.

    Returns the prestige points this building awards at the end of the game.
    int
    getFoodCost()
    Returns the food cost required to purchase this building.
    boolean
    matchesDTO(CardDTO dto)
    Building cards are never restored via DTO (they are recreated by the factory using their ID), so this method always returns false.
    void
    setBuildingEffect(BuildingEffect buildingEffect)
    Binds the effect strategy to this building card.
    CardDTO
    toDTO()
    Converts this card to a data-transfer object for network transport.

  • Constructor Details

    • BuildingCard

      public BuildingCard(ERA era, CARD_TYPE cardType, int buildingID, int foodCost, int endgamePP, EVENT_TYPE applyOn)
      Creates a new BuildingCard with the given attributes.
      Parameters:
      era - the era this card belongs to.
      cardType - the card type (should be CARD_TYPE.BUILDING).
      buildingID - unique identifier for this building.
      foodCost - food cost to purchase this building.
      endgamePP - prestige points awarded at end of game.
      applyOn - the event type that triggers this building's effect.

  • Method Details

    • setBuildingEffect

      public void setBuildingEffect(BuildingEffect buildingEffect)
      Binds the effect strategy to this building card. Called by the factory after construction because the effect depends on the building ID.
      Parameters:
      buildingEffect - the effect to execute when this building is triggered.

    • getBuildingID

      public int getBuildingID()
      Returns the unique identifier of this building.
      Returns:
      the building ID.

    • getFoodCost

      public int getFoodCost()
      Returns the food cost required to purchase this building.
      Returns:
      the food cost.

    • getEndgamePP

      public int getEndgamePP()
      Returns the prestige points this building awards at the end of the game.
      Returns:
      the end-game prestige points.

    • getApplyOn

      public EVENT_TYPE getApplyOn()
      Returns the event type that triggers this building's effect.
      Returns:
      the triggering event type.

    • applyBuildingEffect

      public void applyBuildingEffect(Player player)
      Fires the bound building effect on the given player.
      Parameters:
      player - the player who owns this building.

    • addCardToPlayer

      public void addCardToPlayer(Player player)
      Adds this building to the player's owned buildings.
      Specified by:
      addCardToPlayer in class Card
      Parameters:
      player - the player who receives the card.

    • equals

      public boolean equals(Object obj)
      Overrides:
      equals in class Object
      Parameters:
      obj - the object to compare against.
      Returns:
      true if obj is a BuildingCard with the same building ID.

    • toDTO

      public CardDTO toDTO()
      Description copied from class: Card
      Converts this card to a data-transfer object for network transport.
      Specified by:
      toDTO in class Card
      Returns:
      a BuildingDTO snapshot of this card for network transfer.

    • matchesDTO

      public boolean matchesDTO(CardDTO dto)
      Building cards are never restored via DTO (they are recreated by the factory using their ID), so this method always returns false.
      Specified by:
      matchesDTO in class Card
      Parameters:
      dto - the DTO to compare against (unused).
      Returns:
      always false.
